description: Class relic skill-tree rules for Grudge Warlords. One relic / book per class. Freeform gear still allowed; relic unlocks class systems. UI + combat should read this file.
freeformNote: Any race may equip any weapon/armor. Class relic grants systems (forms, spell slots, sidearm) — never hard-locks loot.

relics.name: Battle Forms
relics.subtitle: Warbound Battle Forms
relics.summary: Warrior identity is Battle Forms: defensive, offensive, self-healing, fear, and high-damage stances. Warriors carry weapons in both hands and may carry a shield. Larger parry, block, and stamina pools under form.
equipmentRules: Can dual wield eligible one-handed melee weapons (main + off-hand).
Can equip a shield in the off-hand instead of a second weapon.
Can wield eligible two-handed weapons in one hand via training (fair conversion: slower recovery, normalized damage, proc bonus — not full 2H power).
Battle Forms modify pools: parry window, block chance/factor, stamina max/regen, threat, and self-heal.
Melee attacks gain natural aim assist in a short cone and directional push on hit.

battleForms.name: Bulwark Form
battleForms.description: Larger block/parry windows, raised defense, stamina pool for sustained guard.

battleForms.name: Onslaught Form
battleForms.description: Higher damage and attack tempo; trades some defense for pressure.

battleForms.name: Bloodward Form
battleForms.description: Self-healing on hit / on successful block; modest sustain.

battleForms.name: Dread Form
battleForms.description: Fear-causing presence; weakens nearby foes and can proc fear on heavy hits.

battleForms.name: Colossus Form
battleForms.description: Large damage stance — slower swings, heavy impact, shove.

actionSlots.name: Main-Hand Attack
actionSlots.description: Primary weapon strike based on equipped main-hand.

actionSlots.name: Off-Hand / Shield
actionSlots.description: Second 1H weapon strike or shield bash/block depending on off-hand equip.

actionSlots.name: Battle Form Toggle
actionSlots.description: Cycle or select active Battle Form (Bulwark / Onslaught / Bloodward / Dread / Colossus).

actionSlots.name: Form Signature
actionSlots.description: Form-specific active (e.g. War Cry, Shield Wall, Fear Roar).

actionSlots.name: Stamina Guard
actionSlots.description: Parry / block / hold-guard consuming the expanded stamina pool.

nodes.name: Battle Forms
nodes.description: Unlock form system and dual-wield / shield carrying.

nodes.name: Dual Wield + Shield Carry
nodes.description: Weapons in both hands, or weapon + shield.

nodes.name: Bulwark Form
nodes.description: Defensive form — larger parry/block and stamina.

nodes.name: Onslaught Form
nodes.description: Offensive form — damage and tempo.

nodes.name: Bloodward Form
nodes.description: Self-healing form on hit/block.

nodes.name: Dread Form
nodes.description: Fear-causing form.

nodes.name: Colossus Form
nodes.description: Large damage stance with heavy shove.

nodes.name: Expanded Guard Pools
nodes.description: Baseline larger stamina, parry, and block under any form.

relics.name: Ranger's Log
relics.subtitle: Ranger's Log (poisons, stealth, quick swap)
relics.summary: Ranger identity is the Ranger's Log: stealth (invisible), automatic poison application, and quick weapon swap from ranged non-magic into a 1H sidearm (dagger/sword/mace/axe). Sidearm slot is a half-size weapon slot to the right of the main weapon when class is Ranger; it activates when the non-magical ranged weapon is on cooldown.
equipmentRules: Primary: non-magical ranged (bow, crossbow, gun, similar).
Sidearm slot (UI): ~50% width, to the right of the main weapon slot, visible only when class is Ranger.
Sidearm accepts one-handed melee: dagger, sword, mace, axe (not magic implements).
When ranged weapon is on cooldown (reload, ability CD, or empty chamber), Ranger Quick Swap activates the sidearm automatically or via hotkey.
Ranger's Log poison tree auto-applies poison on eligible weapon hits (ranged and sidearm).
Stealth / invisible tree from the Log grants invisibility skills and nodes.
Quick Fingers tempo: faster ranged handling; dodge/dash still benefits Ranger mobility.

quickSwap.name: Ranger Quick Swap
quickSwap.description: Enhances swap speed from non-magical ranged into sidearm; returns to ranged when ready.

logTrees.name: Poison Path
logTrees.description: Auto-apply poison from Ranger's Log on hits; potency and DoT nodes.

logTrees.name: Quick Swap Path
logTrees.description: Ranged ↔ sidearm tempo, sidearm damage while ranged is on CD.

actionSlots.name: Sidearm Strike
actionSlots.description: 1H sidearm attack when quick-swap is active.

actionSlots.name: Stealth / Vanish
actionSlots.description: Invisible from Ranger's Log stealth tree.

actionSlots.name: Quick Swap
actionSlots.description: Force swap to sidearm / back to ranged.

nodes.name: Ranger's Log
nodes.description: Unlock Log identity: poison auto-apply foundation and sidearm slot UI.

nodes.name: Sidearm Slot
nodes.description: Half-size weapon slot right of main weapon for 1H melee sidearm.

nodes.name: Auto Poison
nodes.description: Hits apply Log poison without a separate cast (potency from tree).

nodes.name: Quick Swap on Ranged CD
nodes.description: When non-magical ranged is on cooldown, sidearm activates.

nodes.name: Invisible
nodes.description: Stealth tree unlock — enter invisibility.

nodes.name: Swap Enhancements
nodes.description: Faster swap and sidearm damage while ranged recovers.

nodes.name: Poison Mastery
nodes.description: Stronger DoTs and multi-stack poison from the Log.

nodes.name: Ambush from Invisible
nodes.description: Breaking stealth with sidearm or ranged applies bonus openers.

relics.name: Wand Spellbook
relics.subtitle: Wand · Spell Book · Elemental Craft
relics.summary: Mage identity is the Wand + Spell Book: portals, mobility, buffs, heals, and elemental Water/Fire schools with crafting benefits for those elements.
equipmentRules: Wand (or compact staff) is the spell focus; off-hand tome/spell book holds recipes.
Spell book slots accept spell recipes: portals, mobility, buffs, heals, Fire, Water.
Slots 1–3: assignable spell recipes / class abilities.
Slot 4: Place Teleport / portal utility (anchors).
Slot 5: utility (heal, mend, conjure, slow fall).
Fire school unlocks fire crafting bonuses (smelt, cook, forge heat).
Water school unlocks water crafting/gathering bonuses (brew, alchemy, fishing assist).

spellSchools.name: Water
craftingBenefits: Fishing assist when Water school known

nodes.name: Wand Spellcraft
nodes.description: Unlock spell book slots and wand casting.

nodes.name: Spell Book Slot I
nodes.description: First recipe slot (portal / heal / elemental).

nodes.name: Fire School
nodes.description: Fire spells + fire crafting benefits.

nodes.name: Water School
nodes.description: Water spells + water/alchemy crafting benefits.

nodes.name: Portals & Mobility
nodes.description: Place teleport, blink, slow fall.

nodes.name: Buffs & Heals
nodes.description: Party/self buffs and mend line.

nodes.name: Element Craft Synergy
nodes.description: Fire/Water school knowledge improves matching crafting stations.

nodes.name: Full Spell Book
nodes.description: All three recipe slots + utility slot online.

relics.name: Nature Grimoire
relics.subtitle: Forms · Nature spells · Root Portal · Farm assist
relics.summary: Worge identity is the Nature Grimoire: animal forms, nature spells (heals, buffs), Root Portal (sprout a travel tree to the Worge's camp for party and self), and farming assist.
equipmentRules: At selection, Bear Form is unlocked (L0).
While transformed, grimoire supplies form-specific action slots 1–5.
Human form uses nature spells: heals, buffs, storm/root utility.
Root Portal: sprout a temporary tree; party and player may enter to return to the casting Worge's camp (home island / warcamp bind).
Farming assist: grimoire nodes speed crop tend, gather, and nature-node yield near the Worge.

natureSpells.name: Root Portal
natureSpells.description: Quickly sprouts a travel tree. Anyone in the party (and the Worge) who enters is returned to the Worge's camp bind point. Duration and charges scale with grimoire nodes.

natureSpells.name: Grove Husbandry
natureSpells.description: Assist farming: faster tend/harvest on crops and nature nodes while Grimoire farming nodes are unlocked.

actionSlots.name: Shift+5 Flight / Farm Assist
actionSlots.description: Flight form or farming assist toggle when unlocked.

nodes.name: Nature Grimoire
nodes.description: Unlock forms book + Bear Form at start.

nodes.name: Nature Heals & Buffs
nodes.description: Baseline nature heal/buff spells in human form.

nodes.name: Root Portal
nodes.description: Sprout tree portal to Worge camp for party and self.

nodes.name: Grove Husbandry
nodes.description: Farming assist near crops and nature nodes.

nodes.name: Raptor Form
nodes.description: DPS/stealth form unlock.

nodes.name: Form Ability Swap
nodes.description: Slots 1–5 change with active form.

nodes.name: Flight Form
nodes.description: Bird/flight form unlock.

nodes.name: Camp Root Network
nodes.description: Root Portal lasts longer / more party uses per cast.
